daily_summary.headline: Routine Launches and Low Aurora Activity

top_events.title: Routine Launches by Rocket Lab and SpaceX
top_events.description: Multiple launches are scheduled, including Rocket Lab's HASTE mission and several SpaceX Starlink deployments. These are standard missions with no exceptional significance.
top_events.action: Watch live streams for best experience.

top_events.title: Low Aurora Activity
top_events.description: Aurora activity is low with Kp values not exceeding 3.67, providing limited viewing opportunities.

top_events.title: Firefly Alpha Test Flight
top_events.description: Firefly Alpha's Stairway to Seven test flight is scheduled, marking a return-to-flight for the vehicle.
